findings.summary: Skill 'add-regulation' assignTo references unknown agent(s): compliance-officer
findings.detail: assignTo entries must be agent_id, agent_name, or "*". Unknown values are ignored at runtime — likely a typo.

findings.summary: Skill 'setup-branding' allowedTools not authorized by AGT-WS-ADMIN's grants
findings.detail:
Missing authorization for: analyze_brand_document, analyze_public_website_branding.

Fix: either grant AGT-WS-ADMIN a key that authorizes these tools, or remove the tools from the skill's allowedTools.

findings.summary: Specialist AGT-WS-ADMIN has no write/execute grants
findings.detail: Specialists are expected to perform actions. AGT-WS-ADMIN has only read-class grants: . Possibly mis-tiered as specialist when it should be a read-only advisor role, or missing the grants its job requires.
